matrixPage.title: The Matrix
matrixPage.intro: A dedicated hub for one of my all-time favourite films. The Matrix blended cyberpunk style, philosophical storytelling, and iconic action into a movie that still feels ahead of its time.

trilogy.title: The Matrix
trilogy.hook: The original simulation-breaker that changed sci-fi cinema forever.

trilogy.title: The Matrix Reloaded
trilogy.hook: Bigger scale, deeper lore, and one of the best freeway chases in film.

trilogy.title: The Matrix Revolutions
trilogy.hook: A bold ending focused on sacrifice, destiny, and peace through balance.

cast.name: Keanu Reeves
cast.reason: A perfect lead for the reluctant hero turned saviour arc.

cast.name: Laurence Fishburne
cast.reason: Calm authority and absolute belief in Neo's path.

cast.name: Carrie-Anne Moss
cast.reason: Stylish, fearless, and central to the emotional core of the story.

cast.name: Hugo Weaving
cast.reason: One of sci-fi's most memorable villains with a unique screen presence.

pillars.title: Reality vs Illusion
pillars.description: The film constantly asks whether comfort in illusion is better than painful truth.

pillars.title: Choice and Destiny
pillars.description: Predictions, prophecies, and free will collide in every major decision.

pillars.title: Identity and Control
pillars.description: Neo's journey is about reclaiming identity from systems that define who you are.

pillars.title: Style and Innovation
pillars.description: From costume design to bullet time, The Matrix set a new visual benchmark.

quotes.line: Unfortunately, no one can be told what the Matrix is. You have to see it for yourself.

scenes.name: Red Pill / Blue Pill
scenes.impact: The iconic fork-in-the-road moment that defines the entire trilogy.

scenes.name: Lobby Shootout
scenes.impact: A genre-defining action sequence with signature Matrix style.

scenes.name: Rooftop Bullet Dodge
scenes.impact: The shot that cemented bullet time in cinematic history.

scenes.name: Subway Fight with Smith
scenes.impact: A pure clash of ideology as much as physical strength.
